# CWE-301 — Reflection Attack in an Authentication Protocol (safe) (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-301-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"crypto/hmac"
	"crypto/sha256"
	"encoding/hex"
	"encoding/json"
	"net/http"
	"os"
)

// Safe: responds with HMAC of challenge using server-only key material.
func MutualAuth(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	if r.Method != http.MethodPost {
		http.Error(w, "method not allowed", http.StatusMethodNotAllowed)
		return
	}
	challenge := r.FormValue("challenge")
	mac := hmac.New(sha256.New, []byte(os.Getenv("AUTH_HMAC_KEY")))
	mac.Write([]byte(challenge))
	proof := hex.EncodeToString(mac.Sum(nil))
	_ = json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(map[string]string{"proof": proof})
}
